samples:
I hope you know I'm still breathing
My heart beating, my eyes open wide
Wide awake to see the beauty in this masterpiece called "Earth"
And yet we choose to complicate things


It doesn't matter what's right or wrong
As long as I have something left to say
That doesn't mean that there's no other way
To think and feel but one incredible way


Some would point their finger at me now
If only they could see just where we're headed
We are approaching Armageddon
As surely as the tide is turning


Hope springs eternal
But reason must take a back seat


Some may tremble at the thought of dying
The fear becomes so overwhelming
It's time to die before our time has come
Before it all comes crashing down


No more tears for wasted moments
No more fears to haunt this body
Let us hold our heads up high today
And die another day


A few steps beyond sanity
Is where we'll comfort ourselves with
Our own personal Armageddon
Just one step away from insanity


Wake up to the beauty
In this timeless masterpiece called "Earth"

When I was a kid, my mom used to tell me that all I want to be when I grow up is rich and famous
And as I've gotten older, it turns out she was right


I don't have to wear no badge
And I don't gotta whistle Dixie for too long
See, we live in a fucked-up generation where everything is bullshit
Fuck the police


I'm so glad I'm not alive
I wish you had died instead of being here trying to ruin everything
You are an imbecile


My life would suck if I were in your shoes
No one would like to be breathing this kind of bullshit
Dead beats alive any day
Fuck the police


If I could I'd put a bullet in your fucking head
I pray they catch you soon
But if they do they won't bother to charge your ass
We need more than zero tolerance
They should kick your ass out of commission


Fuck the police

I, I, I am alive
'Cause someone told me how to do it right
Someone told me what was wrong and how to fix it
They should know better by now


I am a part of something eternal
A circle that has no beginning or end
And one day soon we will all be eternal
If only you would remember who you are


We have a center within ourselves
That is connected to everything beyond this flesh
Which feeds us, shapes us, makes us eternal
It doesn't judge but simply opens up


But if we go through with our ego-driven ways
We may just consume the body turning
To dust and become extinct before eternity begins


So let yourself be changed by the light that comes in
Don't be afraid to step into the water
There's nothing left to hold you back
Let go and learn to swim

Wake up, smell the coffee
Look around, feel the sun again
You might not like what you see
But you can't stay inside your head forever

Fear, anger, pain, greed, anxiety
Are all an illusion bound within
This form of skin and bone and fat and muscle tissue
For those who feel, remember


Our lives, our deaths, they both don't mean shit
The frightened, weak-minded do not get this
Their fears keep them from seeing through their eyes
What we must all see coming


As time goes on, fear holds you down
Like quicksand deep below your feet
But faith lifts you up like a tidal wave
Giving hope to those who believe


Lift your eyes up, look out upon this wonder
Give thanks for our survival here
Find beauty in diversity in unity in all
Come 'round and join the celebration




One foot in, one foot out
Staying sober 'til three o'clock
Keep my eyes closed until sunrise
Then begin to celebrate
Celebrate the miracle, celebrate the child
Celebration's gotta start with one:
I'm alive!

Crawled away, you hurt me
You didn't even seem to care
Slid right through that back door
Without a word or even a warning


Kangaroo's up on his
Thumbered kangaroo
Don't you dare come 'round here
Stick around any longer
I can see your tail sticking out the back door


Crawled away, you hurt me
You didn't even seem to care
Slid right through that back door
Without a word or even a warning




Jumped up and ran
To bed like a little kid
Not wanting what I have
And sure as hell don't want it
Stick around any longer
I can see your tail sticking out the back door


Crept away, you hurt me
But you know just what you're doing
Sneaky little Bussie
Just trying to get what he wants


Hush now, hush now
Shush now, shush now
Shush now, shush now
Get in line, boy


Slipped away, you hurt me
With no other alibi
Kangaroo's up on his
Tramp-lined kangaroo


Stay inside where it's warm
In your hole beneath my garden
What if I kick it in?
I said I might have time soon
So stay inside until then

Underneath the skin and tattoos
And the tattoos that may not even exist
Is a scared little boy inside


Who has a lot to say, but nothing at all
'Cause no one seems to care


I wish I could start over again
Begin this whole thing all over
'Cause now I’m treading water
Just trying to stay alive
Keep my head above the undertow



Kill the bastard
Kick his ass all the way down
Begging for another chance to live


Don’t you fuckin' judge me
‘Til you know what happened
Maybe then we can have this discussion




Someone tell me what I did to deserve this?
Beat it like a fucking drum
Dabblin' in the back of some bitch
Telling her my fuckin' cum-‘n’done


Fuck your charity
It don’t mean shit to me
Giving blood and plasma
For this bullshit three ring circus sideshow


You think I give a fuck about small claims court?
Give me more, or I’ll sue
Somebody’s gotta stick up for the little guy
Or else they might as well just flush us both away
Shit out my fucking asshole
Right into Area 51


Take it out on someone, anyone, anything
Fretless wonder, here's something no one said:
No one is coming to save you
No one is coming to comfort you
No one is coming to take you home

You know you better run
You know you better hide


Run while you can, but there's a place for me in your heart
There's a place I want to claim


I said run while you can
But the truth is you don't wanna go home
You and I both know that you won't
Stick around until you swallow the fault


Hide while you can, but there's a place for me in your heart
There's a place I want to claim


So run while you can
But the truth is you don't wanna go home
You and I both know that you won't
Stick around until you swallow the blame


Take care now as you leave
Don't you dare look back
Oh oh no
Or I'll shoot you yourself


Shit, shoot, fuckin' bitch, kick rocks
How could you do this? Fuck you
Shoot yourself
Kangaroo fucker
What part of me hurts?
Everything

It's time to get up, it's time to go
It's time to move out like we own this place
Kick back and ride the waves of change
Rage on and live while we can


Someone told me once that life is not a journey but a river that just keeps rising and flowing as long as we keep giving without fear or compromise or blame
Don't you believe in an open center? Don't you trust no one 'til you've been through every fucking door? You don't know what's inside until you kick the fucking door down


Fear leads to paranoia, paranoia leads to hate
And hate leads to blind rage and rape
We must learn to embrace our differences and unite
In order to survive this test of sanity


I see black holes inside my eyes, I see darkness all around
But there is hope, peace of mind when light comes down to meet the ground


Someone told me once that life is not a journey but a river that just keeps rising and flowing as long as we keep giving without fear or compromise or blame
Don't you believe in an open center? Don't you trust no one 'til you've been through every fucking door? You don't know what's inside until you kick the fucking door down

Fear leads to paranoia, paranoia leads to hate
And hate leads to blind rage and rape
We must learn to embrace our differences and unite
In order to survive this test of sanity


Fuck paranoia, fuck paranoia, fuck paranoid
Fuck paranoid schizophrenic maniac
Fuck paranoid psychopath
Fuck paranoid asshole
Fuck paranoid racist
Fuck paranoid homophobe
Fuck paranoid fundamentalist
Fuck paranoid evangelical
Fuck paranoid Christian fascist
Fuck paranoid right wing authoritarian dictator
Fuck paranoid capitalist pig
Fuck paranoid hippie asshole
Fuck paranoid welfare bum
Fuck paranoid Democrat imbecile

Running 'round in circles
Chasing my tail again
Tryna catch what's hiding
Behind my back again


I can see it if I try, but I still don't have a clue
Why the fuck I'm sweating
And breathing through this
Blood-sucking Tussanani
Suck the life right out of me


Got nothing left to give you
I know you better than you think
See right through your ugly
Face and hide behind my back again


I can see it if I try, but I still don't have a clue
Why the fuck I'm sweating
And breathing through this
Blood-sucking Tussanani
Suck the life right out of me




The sun comes up to shine upon us
Then beats down cold upon our head
We feel the rain as we are beaten
Puzzled by our own existence instead


Liar
Cheat and steal and lie
You dirty liar
Shit-eating, fucking liar
Liar
Cheating bastard
Fuckin' liar

You know you better
Watch what you say and what you leave behind
You know I better watch what I say and what I do
'Cause my eyes are open wide


It takes two to lie, it takes two to forgive
Two to get caught up in it, oh no, oh no
But the finger that's pointing at me is not entirely innocent
There was a time when I thought I could survive anything
But then I got tired of sleeping, see?


I should have known better
My heart was pounding, my hands were trembling
And yet there was nothing I could say or think or do
But stare into your empty eyes


Now if it takes two to lie, it's gonna take two to forgive
Two to get caught up in it, oh, no, oh, no
But this time don't you even try to hold me down or keep me down or in
'Cause I promise you right here and now
That I will swing before you like a wrecking ball



Someone told me once
Someone told me everything that's wrong with you
And every time they said something to cheer me on
They sure did brighten up my day
Shrouding all their fears 'round the way they looked away from me
I didn't dare speak for fear of breaking confidence
If only to expose those ugly undertones


The light shines through the window
Don't you judge me
Before we both go tumbling down
How can I feel comfortable
Getting close enough to whisper something
Something personal?


One might point the finger at me
One might blame me, but I wouldn't speak
For the pain that someone else may feel
Is just an extension of my own


Let's play God, let's play God
Play God, let's play God, let's play God
We should be careful who we kick out
Of order and balance, we must stay informed
Some are without fault
This one's guilty as the others


So put yourself in my shoes
Trust your gut, trust your gut, trust your gut
Put yourself in my shoes
Trust in reason, trust your gut
Trust in instinct, trust your gut

It's time to celebrate
The gift that is our breath, our life, and our will to keep moving
We are alive!


If we all came together as one
There would be no fear of any one thing
Fear holds us back and binds us down
But love lifts us up and gives us wings


In the water, there is none above us
On the ground beneath us
For in the sky above us
Only one has dominion over us
It's time to celebrate


Our light becomes a beacon
Calling out hope within each step
Embracing every moment as a gift divine
And celebrating it with each loving gesture




Wake up now
Open your eyes
Feel my hand upon you here again
My chest against you, so close
I can see your fears melting away
As I smile to myself once more
With this new found understanding


Our light becomes a beacon
Calling out hope within each step
Embracing every moment as a gift divine
And celebrating it with every loving gesture
